titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Clement Hurd Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday July 24, 2020 at 03:56

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The collection contains artwork, professional and personal papers, photographs, correspondence, scrapbooks, journals and other papers by or relating to Clement Hurd.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The collection contains artwork, professional and personal papers, photographs, correspondence, scrapbooks, journals and other papers by or relating to Clement Hurd.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research. Box 37 and 47: Restricted fragile material. For further information consult Access Services or the appropriate curator.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Clement Hurd (1908-1988) was an American artist. He is best known for his illustrations of children's books, particularly his collaborations with children's book author, Margaret Wise Brown on the books Goodnight Moon and The Runaway Bunny .

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Clement Hurd Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Clement Hurd Papers. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
After receipt the collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization, by Beinecke Library staff

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from John Windle Antiquarian Bookseller on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund and the Jockey Hollow Fund, 2016. Gift of Thacher Hurd, 2016.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized in four series: I: Children's Book Illustrations and Related Professional Papers, 1935 - 2003; II: Artwork, 1920 - 1983; III: Correspondence, 1902 - 1988; IV: Personal Papers, 1928 - 1997.

did.unittitle: Children's Book Illustrations and Related Professional Papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains illustrations by Clement Hurd for both published and unpublished children's books, and related professional papers, including proofs and mock-ups of published books.

did.unittitle: The So-So Cat , Follow Thomas , My World Illustrations
Under the Lemon Tree , Nicholas , The So-So Cat Illustrations
Goodnight Moon & The Runaway Bunny Posters
The Runaway Bunny and Follow Thomas Illustrations
Wait Till the Moon is Full , artwork
"From Goodnight Moon to Art Dog : Opening 8/1/03"

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 37 (Videocassette): Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: The World is Round - Gertrude Stein Books

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains non-commercial artwork by Clement Hurd, and chiefly consists of paintings. Also included are woodblock prints and screenprints, sketches and posters.

did.unittitle: Untitled, two children swimming in a river
Untitled, view of the Golden Gate Bridge through the woods
Untitled, house through a jungle path,
Untitled, Victorian house overlooking rocks on a cliff
Yale School of Architecture student work
Plate One: A Park Pavillion , architectual rendering
Untitled, birds circling a tree or mountain
Untitled, two men running in a wood
Mounted and unmounted prints, paintings, and posters
Mounted and unmounted prints, paintings, and posters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series consists of correspondence by or to Clement Hurd, and includes a mix of both professional and personal correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains materials related to Clement Hurd's personal life, and includes photographs, scrapbooks, sketch books, journals, and other papers.

did.unittitle: "Master Copy. Memorial Service for Posey Hurd 2/21/97"

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 47 (Audiocassette ): Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: "Clem's speech at luncheon for award to Marg. W. Brown - Kerlan Collection, 1984"

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 47 (Audiocassette): Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 47 (Videocassette): Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Oversized mounted photograph of Clement Hurd
Photograph of a live staging of Goodnight Moon , with Hurd's grandson
Maurice Sendak inscribed poster to Hurd's children for Mozart's, Idomeneo , at the Los Angeles Music Center Opera, 1990.
